div.p: Component: io_uring Capability Discovery & Feature Matrix Generation

ul.li: Missing ZC_SEND: Revert to standard IORING_OP_SEND (copy overhead).
Missing SQPOLL: Fallback to user-space submission (interrupt driven).
No CAP_SYS_ADMIN: Disable fixed-buffer registration if memlock limits exceeded.

div.p: Path: /proc/version Action: Extract Release String Target: struct utsname Offset 0x00: sysname Offset 0x41: release
Action 1: io_uring_queue_init() Action 2: io_uring_register(IORING_REGISTER_PROBE) Action 3: Bitwise AND IORING_FEAT_* flags
